# 23 — Content and Localization Quality

<context-hint>
Use for dictionary, examples, grammar, kanji/vocab levels, admin labels, learner copy, errors, empty states, coaching, or legal copy.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as `bjt-content-quality` and `bjt-localization-japan-vietnam` as needed. Improve one content/localization slice.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read relevant agent file(s).
2. Read `docs/spec/digests/content_quality_digest.md` and/or `docs/spec/digests/localization_japan_vietnam_digest.md`.
3. Inspect target content/i18n/copy files.
4. Verify natural Japanese, Vietnamese clarity, i18n keys, level fit, source/provenance, and learner-supportive tone.
5. Fix one bounded issue or produce a review report.
6. Run/document relevant checks.
</instructions>

<avoid>
- Machine-like Vietnamese/Japanese.
- Hard-coded user-facing strings.
- Unsupported legal/compliance claims.
- Unreviewed imported canonical content.
</avoid>
